Phase A: capture `git rev-parse HEAD` before+after invokeAgent; if `headBefore===headAfter` OR diff only touches `docs/bugs.yaml`/`plans/`, return `success:false`. Phase B: 4 unit tests. Phase C: update bug-fixer + systemic-fixer system prompts to clarify "completed requires a real commit". ~2-3hr effort. Until this lands, the 95% production-quality target is unreachable + /fix-bugs stats are unreliable.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| bug-083-flow-execution-failure-envelope-enrichment                      | bug           | draft       | P1       | fix/flow-execution-failure-envelope-enrichment             | **investigate-026 P1 recommendation.** Synthesizer's per-spec try/catch writes `docs/build-to-spec/failures/<flowId>-failure.{html,png}` (timeout error + URL + stack + DOM/screenshot). bug-fix-context envelope's `flow-execution-failure` branch (line 133-147) only pre-loads spec + manifest — never references the failure artefacts. Empirical: 6 of 6 reading-log-02 flow failures had failure.html on disk; 0 reached the dispatched agent. Phase A: extend resolver to pre-load failure.html + failure.png (when present); `emitFileSection` silently logs missing → over-spec is safe. Phase B (optional): page.goto path → inferred fix-site pre-load. Phase C: 3 unit tests. Sister to feat-067 Phase C's visual-parity diff-PNG pre-load. ~1-2hr effort.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| bug-084-page-goto-timeout-misclassified-as-timeout-no-evidence          | bug           | draft       | P1       | fix/page-goto-timeout-misclassified                        | **investigate-026 P1 recommendation.** When synthesized spec fails at `await page.goto(...)` with `Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded` (dev-server-unavailable / hydration-error / slow-networkidle), runner classifies as `timeout-no-evidence` → routes to bug-fixer. But bug-fixer can't fix env issues; agent stalls or returns completed-without-commit. Empirical reading-log-02 2026-05-11: 6 of 6 flow failures were `page.goto` timeouts (all at `__stepIndex 0`). Phase A: add `dev-server-not-responding` to `FlowPrimaryCause` enum + classifier branch + route to `agentSequence:[]` (operator-review). Phase B: 3 unit tests. Phase C: cross-ref bug-071 in runbook. ~2-3hr effort.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| bug-085-layout-regrouping-routes-to-systemic-fixer                      | bug           | in-progress | P0       | fix/layout-regrouping-routes-to-systemic-fixer             | **Empirical signal from reading-log-02 v2 trio validation 2026-05-12.** 7 of 7 failed bugs were visual-parity `layout-regrouping` — bug-fixer's smallest-diff contract isn't structurally suited; structural drift needs cross-file reasoning. `scripts/file-bug-plan.mjs:defaultAgentSequence` routes all `visual-parity` patterns to `[bug-fixer]` uniformly — no distinction between layout-regrouping (structural) and variant-drift/style-drift/token-drift (surface). Phase A: branch by `violation.parity.pattern` → route `layout-regrouping` to `[systemic-fixer]` (~30min). Phase B (optional): extend `audit-computed-styles.ts:promoteToSystemic` to factor pattern. Phase C: 3 routing tests. Empirical Phase D: 5 of 5 fixes — completion rate 52% → 77% (+25pt lift).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| bug-086-extend-systemic-routing-to-copy-sizing-and-pixel-minor          | bug           | draft       | P1       | fix/extend-systemic-routing-to-copy-sizing-and-pixel-minor | **bug-085 follow-up empirical signal.** Post-bug-085 reading-log-02 run 2026-05-12 left 2 bugs failed: `bug-parity-book-create-copy-sizing-drift` + `bug-parity-book-detail-pixel-minor-divergence`. Both also wall-clock-stalled at bug-fixer, both caught by bug-082 (unverified-completion). bug-085 cleared 5/5 layout-regrouping (100%); same pattern-aware approach should expand to copy-sizing-drift (always typographic, cross-component) + pixel-minor-divergence (high-drift cases are systemic). Phase A.1 conservative: route copy-sizing-drift only (+1 fix → 82%). Phase A.2 aggressive: route pixel-minor too (+2 fixes → 86%). Phase B (deferred): drift-count threshold sub-routing for pixel-minor (only high-drift escalates). ~15min code + tests. Natural bug-085 follow-up.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| bug-051-user-flows-generator-selector-quality-and-mocking-strategy      | bug           | draft       | P2       | fix/user-flows-generator-selector-quality                  | Closes the manifest-author class (2/9 finance-track-01 failures: flow-2 `:has-text` strict-mode violation, flow-4 page.route mocks browser but call originates from backend). /user-flows-generator SKILL.md doesn't warn about either trap. Sister to bug-046+047 (same defense-in-depth shape: SKILL.md anti-pattern + synthesizer post-flight regex lint). Phase A: SKILL.md callouts. Phase B: HAS_TEXT_AMBIGUOUS_RE post-flight. Phase C: backend-mock warning. Phase D: regression tests. Reduces the manifest-author rate at the source.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| bug-072-blank-failure-html-files-from-page-content-swallow              | bug           | in-progress | P1       | fix/blank-failure-html-files-from-page-content-swallow     | Synthesized e2e specs swallow page.content() errors via `.catch(() => "")` and writeFileSync the empty string, producing 0-byte failure HTML in docs/build-to-spec/failures/. Operators see blank files with no debugging context when the page died before content() resolved (globalSetup-thrown abort, page closed by timeout, browser crash). Patches both emit sites in scripts/synthesize-flow-e2e.mjs (lines 615-621 + 807-813) with envelope-fallback that writes URL+error+stack when content unavailable. Strict superset of existing behavior — succeeds-case identical, failure-case writes meaningful envelope instead of 0 bytes.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| investigate-022-factory-verifier-missed-8-review-bugs-on-reading-log-01 | investigation | draft       | P0       | (none — investigation)                                     | reading-log-01 master @ 9d28a0d shipped through full factory pipeline + /fix-bugs cycle (9-of-10 bugs auto-resolved, 1 manually closed) but a manual review surfaced 8 NEW bugs the verifier never filed. Catch-layer mapping shows 5 of 8 (62.5%) blocked by bug-071 synth-e2e wedge, 2 of 8 (25%) by audit-computed-styles-unwired, 1 of 8 (12.5%) by parity-audit raw-HTML blind spot. 5-step plan: confirm bug-by-bug catch-layers, audit synth-e2e wedge reporting, audit audit-computed-styles integration gap, audit parity-verify raw-HTML blind spot, prioritize fixes. Recommendation: ship investigate-019 M-F (per-agent MCP scoping) → re-fire /fix-bugs as empirical validation of H1 (synth-e2e wedge dominates) BEFORE investing in deeper verifier surface area.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| bug-071-playwright-webserver-spawn-zero-bytes                           | bug           | in-progress | P0       | fix/playwright-webserver-spawn-zero-bytes                  | Empirically promoted from deferred → urgent (investigate-022 H1: 5 of 8 review-bugs blocked by this wedge). Playwright's webServer auto-spawn produces 0 bytes for 180s on Windows under nested pnpm shells; 0 synth-e2e specs run autonomously. Empirical isolation 2026-05-07 confirmed: pre-booting backend with ENABLE_TEST_SEED=1 + reuseExistingServer=true → 6 synth-e2e specs run in 3min, surface real bugs. Main fix: orchestrator hoists dev-server lifecycle (`build-to-spec-verify.ts` calls `bootDevServer()` BEFORE runFlows, shares URL with parityVerify, teardown after). Sub-fix D: dev.mjs templates set ENABLE_TEST_SEED=1 by default so operators can run verifier post-review. Sub-fix E (deferred): playwright `reuseExistingServer` health-probe should hit /test/seed-baseline (not just /health) to detect mis-configured pre-existing servers.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
